title: Visual Render Engine Upgrade
description: Preview of real-time text-to-reality asset generation. Video resolution pipelines upgraded, allowing clients to generate custom dream-state videos from raw descriptions. Reality distinction barrier degradation warnings issued.

title: Deep Space Probe Firmware Hotfix
description: Restored telemetry stream from drone 'Voyager_1' at 15 Billion Miles from main server. Patched corrupted telemetry module and fired legacy thruster jets to keep receiver aligned.

title: Booster Reusability Catch
description: Successfully tested 'Chopstick' mechanical arms on the 'Mechazilla' launch tower to catch descending Super Heavy boosters. Booster asset cooldown time reduced from months to hours. Mars colonization pre-requisite completed.
